about.title: Meet
about.description: Dedicated to helping you release, heal and return to your true self.

paths.title: Healing Paths.
paths.description: Gentle, compassionate guidance designed to help your nervous system regulate, bringing you back to yourself.

services.title: Free 30-Minute Intro Session
services.description: A gentle conversation to see if we are a good fit. No pressure, no sales pitches. Just a safe space to share where you're at.

services.title: Mind, Heart & Ease
services.description: A €100 single session focused on immediate emotional integration and nervous system regulation using breathwork and awareness.

services.title: Spiritual Awakening Guidance
services.description: For those feeling confused, disconnected, or overwhelmed by a spiritual awakening. We ground the experience back into the body.

services.title: Four Month Journey
services.description: A €4,500 immersive container. We work closely together to completely rewire how your nervous system responds to life.

paths.soundHealingDescription: Immerse yourself in frequencies designed to bypass the analytical mind. Sound healing drops you directly into parasympathetic rest, allowing deep emotional release without you having to 'do' anything.

retreats.title: Retreats.
retreats.description: Step away from the noise. Our luxury retreats are designed to offer profound rest, human connection, and emotional safety in nature.

retreatsList.title: The Silent Mountain Retreat
retreatsList.description: A 5-day immersive experience in the Swiss Alps. Focus on silence, breathwork, and nervous system regulation. Luxury private cabins, organic meals, and daily guided integration.

retreatsList.title: Ocean Renewal
retreatsList.description: A 7-day gathering on the coast of Portugal. Blending gentle yoga, intensive sound healing baths, and community connection. Relearn how to feel joy without guilt.

retreats.testimonial: "I didn't know how exhausted I was until I finally stopped. Wellness Family didn't try to fix me; they just gave me the absolute safest place to finally rest."

contact.title: Get in Touch.
contact.description: We would love to hear from you. Reach out to schedule a session, ask a question, or simply connect.
contact.sanctuaryDescription: Experience deep healing and return to yourself in a space designed for safety, peace, and integration.
contact.locationDescription: Find our physical location and immerse yourself in a healing environment.

settings.seoDescription: A Global Wellness Movement for Mind, Body & Inner Peace.
